sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101493" key="sustrepte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συστρεπτ-έον</orth>, <sense id="n101493.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must stiffen, check</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὴν κοιλίαν</foreign> (in diarrhoea) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg004:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
